units.description: Sortedness: the output list is sorted in nondecreasing order. (Variant 4 stresses witness existence vs uniqueness and forbids smuggling extra outputs.)
Permutation: the output is a permutation of the input (every element preserved, counts preserved). (Variant 4 stresses witness existence vs uniqueness and forbids smuggling extra outputs.)
common_failure_modes: asserting set equality without counting duplicates

units.description: Termination on every input. (Variant 4 stresses witness existence vs uniqueness and forbids smuggling extra outputs.)
Stability is NOT required and should not be asserted. (Variant 4 stresses witness existence vs uniqueness and forbids smuggling extra outputs.)
